positive_examples: Can you assess the change impact of this diff before I open the PR?
Help me triage this diff by risk before requesting review.
What's the impact of this change on the rest of the codebase?
negative_examples: Can you write a haiku about autumn?

rollback.method: Remove "change-impact" from every profiles/*.json skills array, then delete skills/change-impact/. The skill has no side effects beyond printing a classification table to stdout on demand, so no state migration is needed.
